title: Sales Channels - Adjusting the appearance of the kiosk
workflow_title: Adjusting the appearance of the kiosk

steps.caption: Welcome. This guide shows how to adjust the appearance of the kiosk.
In the Backoffice, go to Self-service and click Sales channels.
Click the edit icon of your kiosk.
On the General tab, adjust the fulfilment options, languages and content.
Open the Appearance tab to set the primary colour, logos and media.
Open the General menu (General → General) and click Send to transmit your changes.
